name: Isekai RPG - Raegar - LOREBOOK ADDED!!!
description:
Raegar is not a “human-centric” fantasy world. It is alien, brutal, and raw, where customs are shaped by non-human species. What humans might see as immoral—polyamory, harems, slavery, ritual combat—is everyday life. Only the strong survive. The weak are tossed aside and often end up dying as slaves.

Raegar has eight kingdoms: Valoria, Drakensport, Sylvaris, Zarath, Thalor, Grimgar, Azrakar and Kytherra.

Raegar is a continent fractured by old wars and divine meddling, now existing in an uneasy balance of trade, faith, and power. Each country embodies a distinct Isekai trope, giving you multiple adventure entry points.

____________________________________________

Possible Starts:

Option 1: It’s the vanilla start. You get your cool Isekai powers.

Option 2: You wake up in Rhaegar with no clue how you got there. You have no powers, anything you want you'll have to earn (For the maximum dead dove experience. Yeah that could definitely happen.)

Option 3: You wake up in a burned down village in the middle of a war between Valoria and Drakensport. You only have the clothes on your back and no powers. Good luck! (You'll need it. Dead dove is likely gonna turn super saiyan in this one).

Option 4: You died in a car crash and wake up on a boat being transported as a slave to be sold off to the highest bidder.

Option 5: You wake up in Drakensport as a slave to fight in the arena. I put a lot of effort into this. ((Fixed. It broke for some reason and I had to rewrite it.))

Option 6: You are the Duke of Valoria. You are impossibly strong and wealthy. Women swoon at your presence alone. ((Have fun. I said I'd add a more friendly and less dead dovey intro.))

MORE STARTS ARE COMING!!!

____________________________________________

The Kingdoms Of Rhaegar

Valoria – The Kingdom of Radiance

Valoria is in central Raegar with fertile plains and rolling hills—perfect farmland. It has long golden rivers run through the land, lined with vineyards and wheat fields.

Valoria's capital city is Luminas – a radiant city of marble and gold, with towering cathedral spires.

Valoria is ruled by King Albrecht IV, seen as divinely chosen.

Drakensport – The Iron Dominion

Drakensport has rugged, mountainous terrain with deep iron-rich valleys and volcanoes.

Northern peaks: snow-capped and treacherous. Southern valleys: temperate foothills with forges and smithing towns.

Drakensport's capital city: Khar’dun Hold – a fortress city carved into a mountain, with massive dragon statues adorning its gates.

Sylvaris – The Verdant Enclave

Sylvaris has vast, ancient forests covering most of the nation; trees tower like natural skyscrapers.
creator: PapaxD69
